rooms.name: Shroomy Forest
rooms.description: WOAH what is this place?? The mushrooms here are huge, taller than you huge, and they glow in colors the normal world forgot. The red and grey ones look important instead of edible. The air smells like pizza for some reason, the ground bounces when you walk, and the trees have smiley faces. This rules.

rooms.name: Joe's Shroomy Diner
rooms.description: Welcome to Joe's Shroomy Diner, the best and only diner in the shroom dimension. The menu lists Mushroom Surprise, Fungus Fries, and Spore Smoothie. Carl the mushroom waiter points at a note by the counter: If you collect all four colored mushrooms, use them here for the house special.
rooms.dev_note: // don't tell mrs henderson about the shroom diner

rooms.name: Imagination Box
rooms.description: It's literally a cardboard box, but when you go inside it is INFINITE. The walls change to whatever you think about. Right now it is a space station. No wait, now it is underwater. No wait, now it is a pizza restaurant on the moon. This is the best room ever made in any game.
rooms.dev_note: // jake said this room is dumb but jake is wrong

rooms.name: Hobbit Hiding Hole
rooms.description: A cozy little hobbit hole waits behind a round green door. Inside are a fireplace, a comfy chair, tea, biscuits, and a very suspicious cat sitting like he owns the entire bonus area. Milo introduces himself, stretches one paw, and challenges you to a duel.
rooms.description_cleared: Milo has been defeated, which he insists was a practice round. The hobbit hole is peaceful again, though the chair now has a few dramatic claw marks.
rooms.dev_note: // milo is based on my cat lol. he drops the best weapon in the game
